info.title: Nexus Partners — Platform Admin API
info.description:
REST API for the Nexus Partners admin portal (staff users).

## Authentication
1. `POST /auth/login` → `accessToken`
2. Send `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` on protected routes.

## Related docs
- **Recruiter portal API** (separate JWT): [/api/docs/recruiter](/api/docs/recruiter)
- Raw OpenAPI JSON: [/api/docs/openapi.json](/api/docs/openapi.json)

## Notes
- Some modules require `requireModule` permissions (salaries, billing, chat, students, ats, job_scrap).
- External ticket create uses `x-api-secret` instead of JWT.
- Request/response bodies are documented at a catalog level; expand schemas as needed.
